title: [TUI] Lock inline footer reserve contract
description: Umbrella subtask under tk-avhl. Replace ad hoc inline-height churn with a clear footer reserve contract: reserve grows with the current draft, shrink leaves slack below the visible footer until reset, and footer layout never overflows the reserved region.

logs.msg: Current state: stable reserve contract improved shrink semantics, but multiline growth still shows duplicate border/prompt lines on first expansion. Next work should focus on prompt-box growth path, footer child placement within reserve, and text-entry-specific edge cases before PTY checklist.
